title: Gherkin v2 prompt language experiment: recipe step executor with cross-feature interactions

generation_target.summary: Generate a Python RecipeStepExecutor with conditional execution, step dependencies (DAG with skip-vs-fail propagation), retry with exponential backoff, timeout handling (not retried), output capture with template resolution, and sub-recipe delegation with context isolation. The key complexity is cross-feature interactions: retried step output feeding conditions, timeout blocking conditional steps, sub-recipe failure vs parent retry, and template resolution for skipped steps.
deliverables: RecipeStepExecutor class with execute(recipe, context) method.
Conditional execution: evaluate condition expressions against context, skip on false or missing key.
Step dependencies: blockedBy forming a DAG. Failed/timed_out deps propagate failure. Skipped deps do not.
Retry with exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s delays. Exhausted retries = failed. Success = completed.
Timeout handling: terminate at timeout_seconds, mark timed_out. Timed-out steps NOT retried.
Output capture: store in context[step_id]. Template syntax {{step_id}} for interpolation.
Sub-recipe delegation: child inherits parent context, outputs isolated unless propagate_outputs is true.
Focused tests covering each feature independently AND cross-feature interactions.
non_goals: Do not implement a CLI or REST API around the executor.
Do not implement persistent storage of execution state.
Do not implement distributed execution across machines.
Do not implement a recipe definition DSL or parser beyond dict/JSON input.

prompt_variants.label: Hybrid Gherkin plus English implementation guidance

fairness_rules: All variants target the same recipe step executor generation task.
The hybrid prompt may add implementation guidance but must not expand the required deliverables.
The acceptance criteria variant may add quality requirements but must not widen scope beyond the same executor.
Prompt reviewers should compare deliverables and non-goals before any full-matrix run.
ownership_notes: This repo owns the experiment assets, manifest, and scoring utilities.
V2 redesign: harder target replacing user-auth ceiling task from PR #3964.
